findings.description: Line 17 imports HypothesisResult from investigation_loop (a sibling behavioral/glue module). HypothesisResult is defined in investigation_types.py. Same issue as hypothesis_card.py line 14. Fix: change to 'from marketmind.pipeline.investigation_types import HypothesisResult'.

notes: Orchestrator imports are structurally correct: hypothesis_card (sibling), integrity/input_guard (cross-package), storage/gate_archiver, storage/archivist, storage/session. No import from app.py. Data flow traced: hypotheses -> generate_cards() -> list[HypothesisCard] -> user interaction -> Gate1Session -> SessionManager.save(GateCheckpoint). sanitize_for_llm_prompt called on all gate1_chat text via _log(). Turn limit (50) and warning (40) enforced. KeyboardInterrupt handler saves partial state.
